images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑style model, 20 years old, flawless yet realistic skin with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet slightly seductive smile, straight glossy black hair cascading over her shoulders. She stands on a rooftop parking lot, a sleek concrete surface softened by a subtle graffiti mural, holding a white laundry bag over one shoulder as if she just stepped out of a laundromat‑style waiting scene. She wears a form‑fitting high‑neck ribbed cashmere turtleneck sweater that hugs her slim waist and ample bust, the tight knit catching the light. Volumetric god‑rays cut through the hazy air, creating bright shafts of light that illuminate her while leaving the distant city skyline softly underexposed, giving the image a dangerous, edgy low‑key mood. Eyelash‑lifted laughing moment captured naturally, eyes sparkling, cheeks flushed, as if sharing a secret with the viewer. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, bokeh‑filled background, ray‑tracing and global illumination for true‑to‑life lighting.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑style influencer perched on a sun‑kissed desert dune, her straight black silky hair lit by soft dappled light through a lone acacia tree. She wears a Korean preppy look: a crisp white silk blouse with a subtle lace collar, top buttons undone to reveal a fitted black lace‑trim camisole, high‑waisted camel mini‑skirt hugging her slim waist and curvy hips, white ankle‑socks and sleek black loafers. A confident smirk plays on her lips, eyes glistening with mischief, one hand on a knee while the other brushes a stray hair. The background blurs into a creamy bokeh of amber sand and teal sky, shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray‑traced highlights, global illumination, and a teal‑and‑orange cinematic grade for an energetic, sporty vibe.8k photo, Large breasts
